steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The statement says: the country that mined 0.55 million metric tons in 2020 had mined _______ in 1995. The task is to find which country mined 0.55 in 2020, then read its 1995 value from the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '0.26 million metric tons of copper in 1995': Kazakhstan mined 0.55 in 2020 and 0.26 in 1995 — both values match the table. ✓
  • Choice B — '0.59 million metric tons of copper in 1995': 0.59 is a 2020 value for a different country, not Kazakhstan's 1995 figure. ✗
  • Choice C — '2.49 million metric tons of copper in 1995': 2.49 belongs to a different country entirely. ✗
  • Choice D — '0.38 million metric tons of copper in 1995': 0.38 is another country's 1995 value, not Kazakhstan's. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
